title: Guest viewing mirrored columns not working
excerpt:
HI, my guests are no longer able to see my mirrored columns. I have given them access to the main board that has all the information so it should work and used to work but has recently stopped. 
Best, 
Rob

posts.author: robraw (Rob Gibson)
posts.cookedHtml:
